overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree showing a player character in a wide-brimmed hat exploring a mystical wetland at golden hour. The character encounters a massive fiery Furnace Golem, then traverses shallow waters and ancient ruins before approaching a temple complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow wetland with lily pads facing a massive fiery construct

events.description: camera completes orbit around the character revealing the full height of the Furnace Golem

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in shallow water, gazing up at the towering fiery construct while the camera circles around

notable_agents.action: massive Furnace Golem standing stationary with cage-like structure containing intense flames

entered.detail: colossal enemy construct made of twisted metal and wood with a fiery cage core
green lily pads floating on the water surface around the character
large stone castle ruins with broken walls and towers in the background
ancient stone structure with arched openings on a raised platform
massive pale moon visible in the sky despite the sunlight

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a shallow lily pond during golden hour, facing an enormous Furnace Golem. The camera orbits around to showcase the scale of the fiery construct, while ancient stone ruins and a large moon are visible in the background.

events.description: character exits the water onto grassy rocky terrain approaching the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shallow water away from the golem toward the stone ruins

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders marking the edge of the wetland

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the Furnace Golem through the lily-filled water toward ancient ruins. The castle ruins grow larger on the left as the character approaches the rocky edge of the wetland.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking a deep chasm with waterfalls

events.description: character reaches cliff edge revealing a vast chasm with multiple waterfalls and floating stone platforms
camera tilts upward to reveal the massive glowing tree backlit by the sun, creating a silhouette effect

agents.ego_description: approaching the cliff edge and panning the camera to survey the waterfall vista and the glowing tree above

entered.detail: rocky precipice overlooking a deep misty chasm
multiple cascades of water falling from floating stone platforms into the chasm
ancient stone bridge connecting cliff sides over the chasm
massive tree with golden glowing branches and roots visible against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a dramatic cliff edge revealing a misty chasm with waterfalls and ancient stone bridges. The camera tilts up to reveal a massive glowing tree silhouetted against the golden sun, creating a breathtaking vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone aqueduct pathway leading to temple entrance

events.description: other figures appear standing near the temple entrance ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone pathway toward the temple entrance where other figures are gathered

notable_agents.action: group of figures standing stationary near the temple entrance, possibly guards or pilgrims

entered.detail: ancient stone walkway with water channels running along its length
large stone doorway with ornate architecture at the end of the path
tall cylindrical columns flanking the pathway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an ancient stone aqueduct pathway toward a temple entrance. The glowing tree now appears to the left as the character approaches, where several figures stand waiting near the stone pillars and temple doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a tense encounter in a mystical wetland toward the grand entrance of an ancient temple complex. It begins with the camera orbiting a character facing an enormous, fiery Furnace Golem in a shallow lily pond, with a large moon and stone ruins looming in the background. As the character turns and walks away from the construct, the scene shifts toward the rocky edge of the wetland where the castle ruins grow larger and more imposing. The perspective then opens up at a dramatic cliff edge, revealing a misty chasm with waterfalls and stone bridges before tilting upward to showcase a massive glowing tree silhouetted against the golden sun. Finally, the camera follows the character along an ancient stone aqueduct pathway, passing the glowing tree on the left to approach a temple entrance where several figures wait among stone pillars.
